theme: pawn shop with one shelf and clairvoyant appraiser
title: The Pawnbroker's One Shelf
strategies: always-bypass: never shelve anything (the checker's own trivial baseline)
size-aware LRU: always admit on a miss, evicting the least-recently-used residents first, with no lookahead at all

whole-trace clairvoyant admission: precompute each visit's exact next-use distance, bypass objects with no future use, and only evict residents whose own next use is no sooner than the newcomer's (a Belady/MIN-style exchange argument generalized to variable sizes with an explicit bypass action)
